overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a continuous walk through a dark neon-lit underground concourse, ascending stairs into a semi-covered walkway with colorful glass ceiling panels, and emerging into a bright sunlit outdoor plaza featuring a distinctive pink building facade and abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underground transit concourse with teal neon lighting

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper level exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concourse and climbing stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: large cylindrical support columns with teal lighting accents
glowing cyan neon tubes illuminating the dark corridor
concrete stairs leading upward with graffiti on walls
colorful graffiti art on concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed underground concourse illuminated by teal neon lights. The camera moves forward past concrete pillars and wall murals, approaching a stairwell. Around the 12-second mark, the character begins ascending the stairs toward the upper level, transitioning from the flat walkway to the stair climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with colorful stained glass ceiling panels

events.description: exits dark indoor concourse into semi-covered walkway with colorful glass ceiling
ambient light increases dramatically as approaching the bright outdoor exit

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath vibrant colored glass panels overhead

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench against the wall

entered.detail: overhead panels of stained glass in teal, red, and yellow filtering sunlight
concrete walls covered in colorful street art and tags
illuminated sign reading 'EL PAISA PAWN SHOP' in yellow and red neon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway featuring a striking colorful glass ceiling that casts tinted light onto the concrete floor. The walls are covered in vibrant graffiti, and a neon pawn shop sign glows on the left. The character walks steadily forward as the environment gradually brightens, approaching a glaringly bright exit at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban plaza with abandoned vehicles and futuristic architecture

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright outdoor plaza with palm trees
dramatic shift from shaded interior to harsh bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking out into the sunlit plaza and turning slightly toward the large pink building and abandoned cars

notable_agents.action: kneeling beside an abandoned car inspecting the vehicle
standing near palm trees in the plaza

entered.detail: massive building with distinctive horizontal pink and yellow striped metal siding
derelict vehicles including a teal vintage car and rusted sedans scattered across the plaza
tall palm trees growing in the urban plaza providing sparse shade
elevated concrete highway or monorail track overhead with teal accents

segments.scene_description: The character steps out of the covered walkway into a blazingly bright outdoor plaza, causing a momentary lens flare. The scene reveals a large open area with a distinctive massive pink building dominating the view, abandoned cars scattered across the asphalt, and palm trees lining the space. The character walks toward the right, passing NPCs inspecting the derelict vehicles, while an elevated overpass structure looms on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit underground concourse into a blindingly bright outdoor plaza. It begins in a dark enclosed space illuminated by teal neon lights, moving past concrete pillars and murals before ascending a stairwell toward the upper level. As the camera emerges from the stairs, the environment shifts into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway where a colorful glass ceiling casts tinted light over graffiti-covered walls and a glowing pawn shop sign. The scene then progresses toward a glaring exit at the end of the corridor, eventually stepping out into a blazingly bright plaza that triggers a momentary lens flare. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a massive pink building, abandoned cars, and palm trees, with the camera panning right past NPCs and under a looming elevated overpass.
